title: Telco ODS - Autonomous Network Health
description: Real-time network health monitoring: MongoDB Atlas ODS + ML inference pipeline
setup_instructions: Import these chart definitions manually in Atlas Charts UI. Charts > Dashboards > Add Dashboard, then add each chart below.

charts.title: Network Health Predictions (Live)
charts.notes: Shows live distribution of ML predictions. Should show ~67% excellent, ~28% good, ~5% poor with default anomaly rate.

charts.title: Anomalies by Region (Time Series)
charts.notes: Shows 'poor' predictions over time grouped by region. Demonstrates real-time anomaly detection across the network.

charts.title: Events Processed per Window
charts.notes: Total telemetry events ingested in the latest windows. Should show ~10M+ per 5-min window (50 cells × ~140k events each).

charts.title: Signal Strength vs Latency
charts.notes: Shows correlation between signal quality and latency. Poor cells cluster in bottom-left (weak signal, high latency).

charts.title: Cell Tower Health Map
charts.notes: Regional breakdown of predictions. Stacked bar shows health distribution per city.

charts.title: Prediction Throughput (Stacked Area)
charts.notes: Volume of predictions over time. Shows the pipeline is continuously producing results.
